title: The Void: Renamed from Planet View, SW Network-First, Rounded Corners Restored
changes: Renamed Planet View to The Void — fresh branding across all UI, JS, and CSS
Void zoom controls replaced redundant zoom buttons with clean zoom-in/zoom-out/reset
New Add-to-Void button in top-bar for quick idea capture from any view
Service worker now network-first for ALL requests — CSS/layout changes appear instantly without force-close dance
index.html no longer cached by service worker — ensures fresh load every launch
CSS cache-busting via versioned query strings on all stylesheet links
Switched from hard-coded class=hidden to style=display:none for toggleable elements — fixes JS visibility toggling
Removed !important from .hidden utility class — no more override conflicts
Restored all border-radius and border properties across the entire UI (sidebar, cards, dialogs, buttons, etc.)
Media-view (player area) deliberately kept border-radius:0 — seamless with main area, no border, inherits background
Note-view header icons no longer clip off-screen — added proper 10px padding to note-view container
Android safe-area padding extended to void-view-header and void-view-footer for notch-safe layouts
Removed duplicate media-view theme overrides (themes.css) — media-view now inherits main-area background cleanly
Added comprehensive Android deploy section to commit checklist (SW stale cache prevention)

title: Vault — Creative Operating System for Chaotic Minds
changes: Complete rebrand: YouTube Vault → Vault
The Void: raw idea capture with no judgment or structure
5-Stage evolution system: Void → Signal → Star System → Island → Active Creation
Planet View: solar system visualization with orbiting idea-nodes
Drag ideas onto each other to create connections (Star Systems)
Auto-promote: connected ideas move to Star System stage
Workbench action buttons: New Challenge, Achievements, New Goal, Planet View
Progress bars (boss-HP style) with segmented fill and glow effect
Challenges: flexible goals with +1 progress tracking per Island/life domain
Goals: weekly objectives with momentum-based progress bars
Achievement system: 10 unlockable badges with auto-detection
Particle burst effects on ideas creation, connection, and promotion
13 new SVG icons: telescope, rocket, orbit, radar, satellite, sparkle, etc.
New achievement/challenge/detail dialogs with stage controls
Retains all YouTube, bookmarks, notes, and download features

title: Todo Lists, About User Pane, Grid Cascade Animation, Drag Improvements
changes: Todo list feature: add/check/uncheck items in notes with editable contenteditable text
Custom SVG circle-check / circle-x toggle icons replacing native checkboxes
Green flash on checking todo (180ms delay), red X hover when checked
Lightweight firework particle burst (12 dots, random colors, glow) on todo toggle
All-red particles when unchecking a todo
Grid view shows list-todo icon and todo preview (up to 3 items) for notes with todos
Sidebar tree also shows list-todo icon for notes with todos
About User settings pane with editable username (edit-on-hover pencil), version, device, reset account
Reset account button with confirmation dialog — clears all localStorage and reloads
Grid cascade animation: sections stagger in (220ms apart), items cascade within (60ms apart)
Workbench header ('{username}'s Workbench') always visible at top of grid view
Grid section headers accept drops: drop note on folder header to assign, drop video to move
Sidebar folder drag-drop now accepts notes (not just videos)
Hidden folders with only notes now show in grid view (was filtering them out)
Splash sequence simplified: removed separate welcome back overlay, integrated into splash
Splash shows 'Checking for updates...' -> 'Up to date' -> 'Welcome, {username}' -> fade
Theme color overrides for all todo elements across black, obsidian, and anthropic themes
SanitizeHtml now allows <input> tags for todo rendering
New SVG icons: list-checks, list-todo, circle-check, circle-x, user-icon
Settings sidebar reordered: About User is now first/active category
Onboarding step transition cleaned up: removed zoom circle, uses clean fade
Fixed particle closure bug (switched var to let in loop)

title: Onboarding Flow, Welcome Back, Zoom Animation, User Name
changes: First-time onboarding: step 0 (welcome) → zoom animation → step 1 (name) → step 2 (confirm)
Next button triggers icon zoom → circle → cover screen → fade to reveal name input
Returning users see 'Welcome back, [name]' overlay after splash with arrow button
User name saved and shown as 'Name's Workbench' in empty grid state
Name editable in Settings > Basic info
Notes auto-detect bare URLs and https:// links, render them bold + clickable
Bare domains (nintendo.com) also auto-linked with https:// prepended
Link detection runs on blur and before save in note editor
Theme colors for onboarding, welcome back, and note links across all themes
Start Over in Debug menu opens fresh isolated window (partition: temp)
onboarding.js added to SW cache

title: NSFW Chip UI, Auto-Apply, Disabled Unblur When Auto-Blurred
changes: NSFW keywords shown as chips with X to delete + Add input
Default keywords pre-populated (pornhub.com, xvideos.com, etc.)
autoApplyNSFW persists blurred flag on matching items across reloads
Unblur option greyed out in context menu when NSFW toggle is on and item matches
NSFW defaults use full domain names to avoid substring over-matching

title: NSFW Blur Fix, Auto-Apply, Splash on Toggle
changes: NSFW now matches keywords in titles, channels, URLs (not just exact domains)
Blur applies to entire grid item (image + title + channel text, not just the image)
Sidebar bookmark/DA labels also blur with NSFW
NSFW toggle shows splash + reloads to apply changes cleanly
Bookmark grid images hide on error (no more CORS error text)
New DAs and bookmarks immediately appear in grid view
Manifest version field added so Android shows correct version number

title: Theme Fix, Settings Spin, Auto-Update on Return
changes: Theme settings no longer show multiple themes as active at once
Settings gear icon spins on click
App checks for updates on visibility change (like Discord) and auto-applies with splash
System theme toggle properly clears theme option active state

title: Modular Codebase, Debug Inspector, Hierarchy Sidebar
changes: CSS split into 5 modular files: base, layout, components, themes, mobile
JS split into 15 modules: data, views, calendar, settings, sidebar, etc.
Debug inspector (Ctrl+D): colored element overlay with title label and fill
Hierarchy sidebar (Ctrl+Shift+H): indented ancestry tree, click to lock and copy selector
Network simulation in Debug menu (Online / 2G / Offline)
Mobile menu button no longer closes sidebar immediately after opening
Focusing YouTube search input opens search landing; blurring returns to grid
Drag grid items directly onto sidebar folders to move them
Search bar expansion only triggers on actual search input focus (not toolbar buttons)

title: Update Toast Fixes, Paste & Note Improvements
changes: Update toast no longer shows on every reload — only when a real update is available
Pressing Update now shows the splash screen before reloading (no more jarring flash)
Mobile image paste no longer blocked by Chrome (won't show 'this app does not permit that')
New note button immediately opens the note editor, skipping the dialog prompt

title: Search Landing, Bulk Select, Drag-to-Reorder Grid, Keyboard Shortcuts
changes: Search landing view: centered 'What do you want to search?' with recent history miniatures
Context menu stays within screen bounds (no more cut-off at edges)
Grid items now show horizontal ellipsis (⋯) button for context menu
Right-click on any grid item opens context menu
Bulk select: Ctrl+click multiple grid items; batch delete, pin, blur, or move to folder
Drag-to-reorder grid items within sections with blue drop-line indicator
Keyboard shortcuts overlay (? key): lists all available shortcuts
Search bar clears automatically when switching to grid view
Sidebar search focus via / or Ctrl+F
Bookmark/DA grid images now use object-fit: cover for zoomed-in look
Pin badge moved to top-left so it no longer overlaps the grid menu button
Settings pane icons added to all categories (Theme, Basic info, Toolbar, etc.)
Link History settings pane shows clickable history miniatures with thumbnails
Search landing auto-refreshes when a new video is saved
Top-bar history dropdown removed (redundant with search landing history)

title: Context Menu Everywhere, Three-Dot Buttons, Splash Icon Spin
changes: Three-dot (ellipsis-vertical) buttons on sidebar tree items for mobile context menu
Long-press on sidebar items triggers context menu
Three-dot buttons always visible at opacity 0.6 (not just hover)
Grid items got context menu via ellipsis button, right-click, and long-press
Drag-to-reorder sidebar items (videos, bookmarks, notes, direct access)
Copy link button next to 'Saved' on video card
Splash icon spin animation with cubic-bezier curve
Replaced Anthropic branding with app's own splash icon
Image paste support in notes
Dark theme scrollbar styling across all views

title: Settings Overhaul, Default Grid, Patch Notes
changes: Welcome screen removed — app now opens in grid view by default
Settings toggles are now persistent (saved to localStorage)
Added Patch Notes section in Settings showing changelog history
Settings toolbar (sidebar btn, YouTube input, compact mode) fully wired
Settings files pane toggles (auto-update, confirm delete, detect extensions) saved
Settings history pane toggles (save/clear link history) saved
App version label shown in Basic info settings pane

title: Notes, Icons, and Polish
changes: Notes feature with image paste support
Grid view with rounded toolbar
Local icon system (no CDN dependency)
Undo/Redo buttons for note editor
Dark theme icon color fixes
Contenteditable note editor (native paste & undo)
Organized project into css/, js/, icons/ folders
Rounded toolbar in notes view too
Welcome page cleaner layout

title: Initial Release
changes: YouTube video saving and folder organization
Bookmark management with preview images
Calendar view for video publish dates
Multiple themes (White, Black, Obsidian)
Search and filter vault content
Drag-and-drop folder organization
Pin important videos
